message:
test(context): Add comprehensive context detection integration tests

Add 34 new tests covering:
- Project detector edge cases (symlinks, permissions, nested projects)
- Context collector caching and fingerprinting behavior
- Relevance scorer edge cases and weight normalization

Tests verify detection for multiple project types (Rust, Node, Python,
Go, Java, Haskell, Nim, Zig, etc.) and scoring behavior with partial
matches, case-insensitive comparisons, and signal patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
